title: Onpilot
full_text:
New Regulated and complex operations into AI agents
AI Workforce customized for your business needs
Onpilot connects to your ERP, CRM, support tools, documents, and APIs to automate real business workflows with approvals, permissions, and audit logs built in.
Get $50 in AI credit when you join
Trusted by
Features
Everything enterprises need to deploy AI agents in production.
Agentic Workflows
Turn time-consuming business processes into working AI agents that can search, reason, take action, and escalate.
Deploy Anywhere
Multi-tenant, VPC, on-premise
Security & Governance
Manage permissions, monitor agent activity, control feature access, and keep audit logs for every action.
Runs

Users

Desk Assistant @ mark@doe.com Batch 27 0 22 3,152
Risk Analyst @ harry@doe.com Form 12 10 1 29,800
New Project @ anna@doe.com Form 10 0 1 4,329
Human-in-the-Loop
Add approval steps before sensitive actions, so teams stay in control of important decisions.
Waiting
Send and wait for approval
Send an interactive Slack message that collects user responses before the agent proceeds.

Work order #WO-4827, Line 3 conveyor maintenance
Root cause investigation complete. Proceeding to schedule a 2-hour shutdown for hydraulic system replacement. Confirm before dispatch?
Approve Disapprove

Built for software and enterprise teams that need tenant separation, customer-specific configurations, and secure access control.

AI that works everywhere you work
Launch white-label AI agents inside your SaaS product, internal dashboard, customer portal, or operations workspace.

Teams bot

Coming soon
W Web widget
Connected
Your AI Partner
Onpilot customizes around your complex workflows and becomes a true AI partner, not just another tool. Dedicated engineers, tailored agents, real outcomes.
You
Our shop floor uses three ERPs and a custom MES, most AI tools can't model that. Can your agent actually handle our work-order routing?
Onpilot Team
Yes, we'll map your work-order flow end-to-end, wire the agent into SAP, NetSuite, and your MES, and tune it on real historical jobs before go-live.
You
Quality team also wants the agent to escalate defect clusters automatically, but with their own approval chain.
Onpilot Team
We'll model that as a separate sub-agent with your QA policy and Plant Mgr approvals. Your workflows, your guardrails, we build around them.
Integrations
Connect AI agents to the systems your business already runs on.
/ Open a maintenance work order in Jira for the Line 3 conveyor jam
/ Notify the night shift supervisor on Microsoft Teams about Line 2 downtime
/ Post today's quality inspection report to #plant-ops

Solutions & Outcomes
From process to AI agent in days, not months.
Deploy secure AI agents that understand your business data, connect to your systems, and complete real operational work.
Workforce Manufacturing Operations Sales & CRM Support Finance Compliance
Roll out an Onpilot agent for HR and IT support across factory and frontline workers. Employees ask routine questions over chat — software access, PTO policy, shift swaps — and get answers in seconds without opening a ticket.
Example prompt Provision Figma and Notion access for Jane in marketing, and notify the team in Slack .
Apps
Workflows used
Software provisioning
PTO policy lookup
Shift coverage requests
Cut help-desk tickets with an HR + IT agent for frontline teams
Security & Access Control
Your data stays yours.
Secure OAuth connections. Encrypted data. Isolated per team. Never used to train models.
Data isolation
Contact records, deal data, and pipeline information stay scoped per team, no cross-contamination.
OAuth-based access
Connect HubSpot, Salesforce, and Pipedrive through OAuth, we never store your credentials.
No model training on your data
Your data is never used to train AI models. Every query is processed and forgotten.
Granular access control
Control which fields, records, and actions each team member and AI agent can access.
Compliance-ready foundation
Built to support enterprise security expectations, including SOC 2 and GDPR readiness workflows.
Audit logs for every action
Every query, approval, and AI action is logged with full context, so you can review what happened, when, and by whom.
How It Works
AI agents that connect, act, and stay under control
Designed for enterprise, operations, and product teams that need AI agents to work safely inside real systems.
01 Connect
Bring in APIs, databases, documents, CRMs, ERPs, knowledge bases, support tools, and workflow systems.
APIs Databases Documents CRMs ERPs Knowledge bases Support tools Workflows
3,200+
02 Configure
Define what each agent can answer, what tools it can use, which actions need approval, and who can access it.
03 Deploy
Launch agents inside your website, SaaS product, internal dashboard, Slack, Teams, email, or customer portal.
04 Control
Monitor usage, review decisions, manage permissions, and keep a full audit trail of every interaction and action.
100+ teams shaped their AI strategy this quarter
Get your free AI strategy session
See workflows we've already built for teams in your industry. In 30 minutes, we'll walk through Onpilot live and leave you with a tailored AI plan you can take to your team.
Book a demo No commitments
